en: Pillow fight! Yeah, yeah. We're going!
ko: Pillow fight! Yeah, yeah. We're going!

en: Yeah. Hold me! Seriously, hold me!
ko: Yeah. Hold me! Seriously, hold me!

en: Fear, you have a parachute? The question is, why don't any of you?
ko: Fear, you have a parachute? The question is, why don't any of you?
ja: 本当につかまって！ビビリ、パラシュートあるの？問題は、なぜ君たちは持ってないの？
zhTW: 認真的，抓住我！恐懼，你有降落傘？問題是你們為什麼沒有？
vi: Nghiêm túc đấy, giữ tôi! Sợ Hãi, cậu có dù không? Vấn đề là sao các cậu không có?

en: Disney and Pixar's Inside Out 2, only in cinemas.
ko: Disney and Pixar's Inside Out 2, only in cinemas.
